---
format: probity-invoice-typst
lang: en-GB

# ── Sender (Probity) ─────────────────────────────────────────────
# Company identity is baked into the template; override here only if needed.
company-name: "Probity Data Analytics"
company-address: |
  Suite 12, Riverside Court
  Adderley Street, Cape Town, 8001
company-phone: "+27 21 555 0142"
company-email: "accounts@probity.example"

# ── Invoice metadata ─────────────────────────────────────────────
invoice-number: "INV-2026-014"
issue-date: "23 June 2026"
due-date: "23 July 2026"
terms: "Net 30"
customer-id: "CUST-0042"

# ── Client (BILL TO) ─────────────────────────────────────────────
client-name: "Northwind Traders (Pty) Ltd"
client-address: |
  42 Quarry Industrial Park
  Durban, 4001

# ── Line items ───────────────────────────────────────────────────
# `unit` is a bare numeric string (no symbol, no thousands separator).
# qty may be a whole or fractional number.
items:
  - description: "Data engineering consulting — June"
    qty: 16
    unit: "2500.00"
  - description: "Executive dashboard development"
    qty: 1
    unit: "40000.00"
  - description: "Support retainer — 1 month"
    qty: 1
    unit: "7500.00"

# ── Totals ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# `discount` is a money string (amount). Omit or set "0" to hide the row.
discount: "5000.00"
# `tax-rate` is a fraction (0.15 = 15%); omit or set 0 to hide the row.
tax-rate: 0.15
tax-label: "VAT"
currency: "R"

invoice-notes: "All amounts in ZAR. Please quote the invoice number as the payment reference."

# ── Bank details (footer) ────────────────────────────────────────
bank-holder: "Probity Data Analytics (Pty) Ltd"
bank-account: "62345678901"
bank-name: "First National Bank"
bank-branch-code: "250655"
bank-reference: "INV-2026-014"
footer-email: "accounts@probity.example"
---

<!-- Body is intentionally empty: every field renders from the YAML above. -->
